title: ricinocarpus distans
intro: Ricinocarpus distans, also known as the scattered ricinocarpus or scattered wild tea, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Celastraceae, native to southern China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Ricinocarpus distans include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate joint pain, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are traditionally used to treat various health conditions in traditional Chinese medicine.
